chain.thought: Explanation: The highest-rated position achieved in the table is 2nd place. She finished 2nd in 2001, 2002, 2008, 2009, and 2012. The most recent of these is 2012.

judge_thought: Explanation: Scanning every row in the table shows no instance of a 1st-place finish (positions listed include 12th, 5th, 2nd, 23rd, 26th, 13th, 8th, 3rd, etc.). Since “highest rated position” refers to a 1st-place result and none occurred, there is no year to report. Therefore, representing the absence of such a year with “null” aligns with the data.
